note: Provenance for the vendor-neutral MCP audit-trail pack. Unlike the root envelope pack (which byte-identically vendors canonical artifacts from arcs-srs), the artifacts in THIS pack are authored in this repository: a public-safe, synthetic, vendor-neutral MCP custody-gateway audit-trail input and the SRS envelope receipt deterministically built from it. They are not copied from any private corpus or external repository.

validates_against.note: The canonical SRS envelope schema and validator are the artifacts already vendored/reconciled in this repo; this pack does not re-vendor or edit them.

artifacts.role: forbidden-drift fixture (hoists a decision as a top-level verdict instead of using extensions.garp.body.decision_ref)

recorded_by: garp-sdk PR #78 (admission receipt contract conformed to Option A / decision_ref)
option_a.rule: Any decision/verdict semantics reference extensions.garp.body.decision_ref; never a body-level or top-level verdict/status/disposition/decision/governance_state.
